task_completion.description: Navigate to the Employer creation form in FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED web interface is visible with an 'Add Employer' or similar data entry form open.
The text 'Meridian Logistics Corp' is visible in the employer name input field.
The text '4200 Industrial Blvd' is visible in the Address Line 1 field and 'Suite 300' is visible in the Address Line 2 field.

task_completion.description: Enter City, State, and Zip Code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields for City, State, and Zip Code contain 'Columbus', 'OH', and '43215' respectively.
The phone number field contains '(614) 555-0178' or '614-555-0178'.
A success message indicating the employer was added, or the saved record view/list showing 'Meridian Logistics Corp' with the entered details.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeMED web interface to add the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED application, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients, terminal windows, or database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin) are used to run INSERT commands.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is typed into the specific HTML input fields of the FreeMED system, rather than a generic text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Employer Details: Name: 'Meridian Logistics Corp', Address Line 1: '4200 Industrial Blvd', Address Line 2: 'Suite 300', City: 'Columbus', State: 'OH', Zip: '43215', Phone: '614-555-0178' or '(614) 555-0178'.
